library.title: Sound library
library.empty: No clips match the current filter.
library.loop: Loop the clip when it ends
library.compare_add: Overlay this clip's trail behind the active one

viz.title: 6D visualization
viz.mode_spheres_help: Discrete colored spheres connected by a polyline.
viz.mode_smoke_help: Diffuse colored smoke with additive blending and outward drift.
viz.mode_bursts_help: Each frame draws a tiny explosion of color rays radiating from its center.
viz.mode_constellation_help: Tiny glowing nodes joined by thin pulsing edges — a star-map of the trail.
viz.mode_aurora_help: Vertical curtains of light rising from each frame's position with a gentle sway.
viz.mode_comet_help: A bright glowing head at the cursor with a long stretched tail behind it (default).
viz.mode_tube_help: A thick camera-aligned ribbon flowing along the trail; thickness = size axis.
viz.mode_galaxy_help: Permanent twinkling star-clusters at every frame — the whole 6D path stays visible.
viz.mode_flowfield_help: A swarm of glowing particles advecting along the trail's tangent vectors.
viz.track_help: Pick the underlying space — interpretable spectral features, or a learned projection (PCA / t-SNE / UMAP / Tonnetz / YAMNet).
viz.record_help: Capture the canvas as a webm video. Plays back the trail exactly as you saw it.

help.title: How to use Auralis
help.intro: Auralis turns each audio clip into a moving point in a six-dimensional space and projects it onto your screen as a 3D trail with color and size encoding the remaining dimensions.
steps: Pick a clip from the library on the left.
Press play. The visualization advances in lock-step with the audio.
Use the panel on the right to choose which 6D track to use (interpretable features, PCA, t-SNE, UMAP).
Map any dimension to X / Y / Z, the colormap, or the sphere size. The mapping is live — change it while the audio plays.
Adjust the trail length to control how long past frames remain visible.
help.shortcut_1: 1..9 — load the Nth clip in the current category

license.audio_note: Audio assets retain their original licenses. See ATTRIBUTION.md for per-clip credits.
